name: John K
message: I've been using dysumcorp since the early beta and it's completely replaced the way I collect files from clients. No more emailing back and forth — just send the link and everything lands in my Drive.

name: Nathan Yegon
message: The simplicity is what got me. Set up a portal in under two minutes, shared the link, and files started showing up in my Dropbox instantly. It just works.
